decision: request.json gains schema_version: 1 via typed TrialRequestFile
authority: operator delegation 2026-07-05: accept high-confidence plan recommendations
rationale: additive key; existing images json.loads and pick keys; docker request test extended

decision: holdout.json v1 schema with kind discriminator (assertion|pytest|command); absent kind = opaque bespoke grading unchanged
rationale: purely additive contract; existing files remain valid forever

decision: additive optional tasks.yaml fields (inline holdout sugar, EnvironmentSpec keys), written pre-lock only
rationale: task sha covers raw bytes; existing locked files untouched

decision: fix control-reuse fingerprint task key plugins -> plugin_ids; bump FINGERPRINT_VERSION
rationale: live defect (docs+grade use plugin_ids); FINGERPRINT_VERSION is the designated change lever; old bundles refuse cleanly

decision: add sdk/images/hermetic/webkit to .importlinter source lists as they land; add 'sdk is a leaf consumer' contract
rationale: mechanical; completeness meta-test forces same-commit updates

decision: re-document 'only harbor talks to Docker' as 'only harness.hermetic talks to Docker'
rationale: claim already false via grade/container.py; re-scoping is the honest fix; AST harbor-naming sweep unchanged

decision: events.py declarative EventSpec registry; constructors stay as thin wrappers; byte-identity proven by Phase-0 constructor-replay golden before conversion
rationale: canonical_line sorts keys so bytes depend only on (key set, values); golden pins it

decision: verdict-JSON format instruction stays in rubrics for now; SDK ships a rubric template as the single source; packet-framing move NOT taken
rationale: plan's own recommendation was to not bundle this contract change; template solves the duplication without moving packet_sha256

decision: tasks.yaml read side stays lenient; ship a validate-tasks lint verb (write-side builders are strict)
rationale: read-side strictness would touch a hash-feeding loader; lint verb gets the UX win risk-free

decision: fake engine gains fail-closed proxy_log_missing parity when a proxy is configured (shared EngineBase scan)
rationale: behavior change confined to configured-proxy fakes; scheduler tests stop scripting the reason string by hand

decision: VERDI_REQUIRE_PROXY stays an operator-run switch; it is deliberately NOT wired into the CI docker job
rationale: the managed metering-proxy path is fail-closed and is CI-covered on the docker job by its own live e2e (test_e2e_managed_proxy.py: stands the managed proxy up, drives an allowed and a denied host, asserts per-trial attribution); the only remaining proxy gate, test_reference_proxy_log_attributes_allow_and_deny, exercises the EXTERNAL reference-Squid deployment (deploy/metering-proxy/) that CI does not provision, so VERDI_REQUIRE_PROXY correctly stays operator-run (tests/fixtures/proxy.py) rather than a wiring TODO

decision: analyze process diagnostics derive dimensions from the union of ledgered dim_ids; additive rubric-file sha on process_score events
rationale: option (a) of refactor 06 §7: no new un-committed inputs; honest about what actually scored

decision: serve/review/author JS moves from escaped Python strings to package-data .js files inlined at serve/bundle time
rationale: byte-equivalent output; lintable/diffable JS; Python<->JS mirrors gain parity tests or server-shipped values

decision: TrialRequest gains optional otlp: OtlpConfig; RunConfigFile gains additive otlp.managed; harbor injects OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT / OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_HEADERS (x-verdi-trial) / NO_PROXY=verdi-trace-collector
rationale: additive and None-defaulted everywhere; frozen request.json untouched because config rides standard OTel env vars; NO_PROXY pinned by contract test so span posts never route through the metering proxy

decision: failure_reason vocabulary gains span_log_missing and spans_corrupt, inserted after proxy_log_missing in the downgrade ladder; fake engine gains scripted-envelope parity (A10 pattern); configured collector = telemetry required, fail closed
rationale: opt-in config is the semantics of required; silent asymmetric telemetry loss across paired trials biases forensics with no ledger trace; degradation-event alternative rejected as new frozen contract surface

decision: TrialRecord gains additive spans_sha; _reshape_trial hoists it beside trajectory_sha/flight_recorder_sha; TRIAL EventSpec omit_if_none extended; constructor-replay golden extended both ways in the same commit
rationale: third instance of the established sha-hoist pattern; existing event bytes unchanged when absent; separate spans event rejected (breaks one-event-per-operation cohesion)

decision: opentelemetry-proto (+protobuf) ships as optional extra verdi-bench[otlp]; lazy import; protobuf envelope without the extra fails loud with actionable message; version range pinned
rationale: JSON-only breaks unmodified-SDK promise (most SDKs default http/protobuf); hard dep drags protobuf into every install; vendoring a decoder rejected

decision: raw collector envelope log deleted on teardown after per-trial extraction; --keep-raw / TraceCollector.managed(keep_raw=True) opt-in retains it operator-tier
rationale: secrets inside base64 protobuf bodies are invisible to redact_artifacts so retention cannot be made safe; the redacted sha-bound per-trial artifact is the evidence of record; flight-recorder-charter tension noted and accepted

decision: trajectory source is pre-registered per arm (platform: otlp or not); no data-dependent fallback between span- and log-derived trajectories and no merging in v1; coherence validated at plan/run time
rationale: which bytes were graded must be knowable from the locked spec alone; fallback is a runtime accident and a gaming vector; raw artifact is preserved so future merge semantics can be re-run over old evidence under their own approval

decision: file-edit tool-name set starts minimal: claude_code parity (Edit, Write, MultiEdit, NotebookEdit) plus write_file, edit_file, create_file, str_replace_editor; golden-pinned, extended only via OTLP_MAPPING_VERSION bump
rationale: misclassification is asymmetric (missed edit = under-specific, false edit = wrong data) so bias small; extension is a cheap reviewed golden bump

decision: execute A8: verdict-JSON contract moves into packet framing (framing v2); rubric template slims to judgment criteria; golden_ledger first-ever regen sanctioned IF the replay recomputes packet bytes (GOLDEN_HEAD_HASH human-edit ceremony)
rationale: makes the response contract un-omittable; residual CANT_JUDGE(parse) papercut for hand-authors eliminated; packet_sha256 framing fingerprint is the designed lever

decision: VerdiRefusal base in new leaf harness/errors.py; refusal families reparented; raw pydantic ValidationError wrapped at the schema boundary with message-verbatim str(); refusal_exit catches the base
rationale: completes the fail-loud story the CLI kit docstring defers; forgotten refusal = named exit-2, never a traceback; message pins untouched

decision: scheduler split (refactor 04 §5) will not be done
rationale: interleave.py is under the size gate, dense with resume/executed_order/one-event pins, and its real defect (exception-mutation spend) was fixed in P5D; splitting is churn without pain

decision: concurrent-run sidecar name collisions stay a documented single-operator limitation; spec a plan only if it bites in real usage
rationale: fix requires per-run names threaded through ProxyConfig/engine seam — its own small spec; observed only as orchestration-time test-vs-script contention

decision: test-pruning pass per refactor 14: expired migration oracles rewritten-or-deleted, old-literal pins relaxed to semantic assertions, tautological facade-parity halves deleted, vacuity hunt; every change carries a purpose-expired rationale + a mutation proof naming the surviving guard; AC/golden/meta/e2e/property/live-parity tests untouchable
rationale: suite cost is brittleness (pins on migration accidents firing false alarms on legitimate change), not runtime; the operator approval is the CLAUDE.md human agreement for test changes, with per-change justification still required
